frontmatter.title: Advanced Configuration
frontmatter.description: Advanced configuration options for power users

html:
Advanced Configuration

This section covers advanced configuration options for power users and complex deployments.

Conversation Configuration

Safe Lane Settings

Safe lane provides controlled execution with planning and verification:

[conversation]
safe_lane_plan_execution_enabled = false
safe_lane_max_tool_steps_per_turn = 1
safe_lane_node_max_attempts = 2
safe_lane_plan_max_wall_time_ms = 30000
Option Default Description
safe_lane_plan_execution_enabled false Enable safe lane planning
safe_lane_max_tool_steps_per_turn 1 Max tool steps in safe lane
safe_lane_node_max_attempts 2 Max attempts per plan node
safe_lane_plan_max_wall_time_ms 30000 Max planning time

Verification Settings

[conversation]
safe_lane_verify_output_non_empty = true
safe_lane_verify_min_output_chars = 8
safe_lane_verify_require_status_prefix = true
safe_lane_verify_adaptive_anchor_escalation = true

Session Governor

Controls session health and backpressure:

[conversation]
safe_lane_session_governor_enabled = true
safe_lane_session_governor_window_turns = 96
safe_lane_session_governor_failed_final_status_threshold = 3
safe_lane_session_governor_backpressure_failure_threshold = 1

Backpressure Guard

[conversation]
safe_lane_backpressure_guard_enabled = true
safe_lane_backpressure_max_total_attempts = 32
safe_lane_backpressure_max_replans = 8

Risk Thresholds

[conversation]
safe_lane_risk_threshold = 4
safe_lane_complexity_threshold = 6
high_risk_keywords = ["rm -rf", "drop table", "delete", "credential", "prod"]

Health Thresholds

[conversation]
safe_lane_health_truncation_warn_threshold = 0.30
safe_lane_health_truncation_critical_threshold = 0.60
safe_lane_health_verify_failure_warn_threshold = 0.40
safe_lane_health_replan_warn_threshold = 0.50

Hybrid Lane Settings

Hybrid lane combines fast and safe execution:

[conversation]
hybrid_lane_enabled = true
fast_lane_max_tool_steps_per_turn = 1
fast_lane_parallel_tool_execution_enabled = false
fast_lane_parallel_tool_execution_max_in_flight = 4
fast_lane_max_input_chars = 400

ACP Configuration

Agent Control Plane for advanced orchestration:

[acp]
enabled = false
backend = ""
default_agent = "codex"
allowed_agents = []
max_concurrent_sessions = 10
session_idle_ttl_ms = 600000
startup_timeout_ms = 60000
turn_timeout_ms = 300000
bindings_enabled = false
emit_runtime_events = false

ACP Dispatch

[acp.dispatch]
enabled = true
conversation_routing = "per_channel"
allowed_channels = []
allowed_account_ids = []
bootstrap_mcp_servers = []
working_directory = ""

ACP Backends

[acp.backends.acpx]
enabled = true

[acp.backends.acpx.mcp_server]
command = "/path/to/mcp-server"
args = []
env = {}

External Skills Configuration

[external_skills]
enabled = false
require_download_approval = true
allowed_domains = []
blocked_domains = []
install_root = ""
auto_expose_installed = false

Audit Configuration

[audit]
mode = "fanout"
path = "~/.loongclaw/audit/events.jsonl"
retain_in_memory = true
Mode Description
in_memory Keep events in memory only
jsonl Write events to JSONL file
fanout Both memory and file

Provider State Backend

[provider]
profile_state_backend = "file"
profile_state_sqlite_path = ""
profile_state_max_entries = 256

Profile Health Settings

[provider]
profile_health_mode = "provider_default"
profile_cooldown_ms = 60000
model_candidate_cooldown_ms = 300000

Tool Schema Settings

[provider]
tool_schema_mode = "provider_default"
tool_schema_disabled_model_hints = []
tool_schema_strict_model_hints = []

Runtime Snapshots

Create and restore runtime snapshots for reproducibility:

# Create snapshot
loongclaw runtime-snapshot --label "baseline" --output snapshot.json

# Restore snapshot
loongclaw runtime-restore --snapshot snapshot.json --apply

Runtime Experiments

# Start experiment
loongclaw runtime-experiment start \
  --snapshot baseline.json \
  --output experiment.json \
  --mutation-summary "Added feature X"

# Finish experiment
loongclaw runtime-experiment finish \
  --run experiment.json \
  --result-snapshot result.json \
  --decision approve

Environment Variables

Variable Description
LOONGCLAW_CONTEXT_ENGINE Override context engine
LOONGCLAW_MEMORY_SYSTEM Override memory system
LOONGCLAW_ACP_BACKEND Override ACP backend
LOONGCLAW_SQLITE_PATH Memory database path
LOONGCLAW_SLIDING_WINDOW Sliding window size
LOONGCLAW_WASM_CACHE_CAPACITY WASM cache capacity

Benchmark Commands

Test system performance:

# Programmatic pressure test
loongclaw benchmark-programmatic-pressure --enforce-gate

# WASM cache benchmark
loongclaw benchmark-wasm-cache --enforce-gate

# Memory context benchmark
loongclaw benchmark-memory-context --enforce-gate
